author: Bortlesboat
name: 10L + Two-Pass Order-11 N-gram Backoff + Order-Adaptive Entropy
blurb: 10L d=512 GQA 8H/4KV, LeakyReLU(0.5)^2, Partial RoPE, LN Scale, XSA last 4, Value Residual, EMA(0.997). Two-pass eval: pass 1 builds hashed n-gram cache (orders 2-11) with order-adaptive entropy-gated alpha, pass 2 rescores early cold-cache windows with full cache. Mean of 3 seeds.
